specific_question: Between March 1 and December 31, 2024, how many unused assets did Elexion Automotive’s lifecycle team decommission from its digital asset registry?
answer: Internal decommissioning records show that Olivia Martinez’s team removed 327 inactive assets from Elexion Automotive’s registry between March 1 and December 31, 2024.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
